news.title: Jasti Family Trust sold 7.7M shares of Cohance Lifesciences at an avg price of 306.
news.summary: Jasti Family Trust sold 7.7M shares of Cohance Lifesciences at an avg price of 306.

news.title: Cohance Life shares surged over 6% after notable trade activity.
news.summary: Cohance Life shares surged over 6% after notable trade activity.

news.title:
Cohance Life witnessed an NSE block trade of 6,727,880 shares at Rs 309.
The transaction totalled Rs 207.9 crore during the pre-open session.
news.summary:
Cohance Life witnessed an NSE block trade of 6,727,880 shares at Rs 309.
The transaction totalled Rs 207.9 crore during the pre-open session.

news.title:
Cohance Life reiterates mid-term margin guidance of 30%+, seeing current margin pressures as timing-related.
Management views margin pressures as temporary, not indicating a structural reset per concall update.
news.summary:
Cohance Life reiterates mid-term margin guidance of 30%+, seeing current margin pressures as timing-related.
Management views margin pressures as temporary, not indicating a structural reset per concall update.

news.title:
Cohance Life has not provided FY27 growth guidance as budget assumptions are being finalized.
Caution is exercised due to FY26 performance, per the company's concall update.
news.summary:
Cohance Life has not provided FY27 growth guidance as budget assumptions are being finalized.
Caution is exercised due to FY26 performance, per the company's concall update.

news.title:
Cohance Life maintains $1B sales target for FY30 despite potential timeline shifts.
FY26 challenges may slightly affect achieving the long-term sales goal.
news.summary:
Cohance Life maintains $1B sales target for FY30 despite potential timeline shifts.
FY26 challenges may slightly affect achieving the long-term sales goal.

news.title:
Cohance Life forecasts growth in FY27, driven by business pipeline improvements.
Recovery in the API Plus segment is expected to support the growth trajectory.
news.summary:
Cohance Life forecasts growth in FY27, driven by business pipeline improvements.
Recovery in the API Plus segment is expected to support the growth trajectory.

news.title:
Cohance Life revises FY26 revenue outlook to early-mid double-digit decline.
Concall update confirms adjusted guidance reflecting revenue drop.
news.summary:
Cohance Life revises FY26 revenue outlook to early-mid double-digit decline.
Concall update confirms adjusted guidance reflecting revenue drop.

news.title:
Cohance Lifesciences' Q3 EBITDA dropped to ₹960M from ₹1.1B YoY.
EBITDA margin fell to 17.6% compared to 38.1% YoY.
news.summary:
Cohance Lifesciences' Q3 EBITDA dropped to ₹960M from ₹1.1B YoY.
EBITDA margin fell to 17.6% compared to 38.1% YoY.

news.title:
Cohance Lifesciences, formerly Suven Pharma, reported a 9.3% YoY revenue growth in 9MFY26, excluding inventory de-stocking impacts.
Adjusted EBITDA margins stood at 24.2%, driven by subsidiary consolidation, while investments continued in capacity expansion and team building.
news.summary:
Cohance Lifesciences, formerly Suven Pharma, reported a 9.3% YoY revenue growth in 9MFY26, excluding inventory de-stocking impacts.
Adjusted EBITDA margins stood at 24.2%, driven by subsidiary consolidation, while investments continued in capacity expansion and team building.

news.title: USFDA issued a warning letter to Cohance Lifesciences over compliance issues at a facility.
news.summary: USFDA issued a warning letter to Cohance Lifesciences over compliance issues at a facility.

news.title:
Cohance Lifesciences' Hyderabad pharma plant inspected by USFDA in Aug 2025.
Received Warning Letter post OAI status; US facility added 2% FY25 revenue, 1% EBITDA.
news.summary:
Cohance Lifesciences' Hyderabad pharma plant inspected by USFDA in Aug 2025.
Received Warning Letter post OAI status; US facility added 2% FY25 revenue, 1% EBITDA.

news.title:
Cohance Lifesciences received a USFDA warning for its Nacharam facility.
The facility contributes less than 2% to the company's total US revenue.
news.summary:
Cohance Lifesciences received a USFDA warning for its Nacharam facility.
The facility contributes less than 2% to the company's total US revenue.

news.title:
Cohance Lifesciences appoints Sunil Kumar Singh as Senior Management Personnel, effective Jan 19, 2026.
Mr. Singh, with 35+ years in pharma quality, has worked with Dr. Reddy's, Mylan, Zydus, Glenmark, and Cipla.
news.summary:
Cohance Lifesciences appoints Sunil Kumar Singh as Senior Management Personnel, effective Jan 19, 2026.
Mr. Singh, with 35+ years in pharma quality, has worked with Dr. Reddy's, Mylan, Zydus, Glenmark, and Cipla.

news.title:
Cohance Lifescience reports 124% monthly growth in exports.
The company also achieved a robust 43% yearly export growth.
news.summary:
Cohance Lifescience reports 124% monthly growth in exports.
The company also achieved a robust 43% yearly export growth.

news.title:
Cohance Lifesciences Ltd received a credit rating of 'IND AA/Stable' and 'IND A1' for INR6,850M bank loan facilities from India Ratings.
The ratings cover loans from multiple banks, including Citibank, Axis Bank, HDFC, and SBI, with specified amounts and ratings.
news.summary:
Cohance Lifesciences Ltd received a credit rating of 'IND AA/Stable' and 'IND A1' for INR6,850M bank loan facilities from India Ratings.
The ratings cover loans from multiple banks, including Citibank, Axis Bank, HDFC, and SBI, with specified amounts and ratings.

news.title:
Cohance Lifesciences' board approves $10M investment in NJ Bio Inc.
Investment via convertible preferred stock to support growth and capex.
news.summary:
Cohance Lifesciences' board approves $10M investment in NJ Bio Inc.
Investment via convertible preferred stock to support growth and capex.

news.title:
Cohance Lifesciences announces investor meet on Nov 27, 2025.
Event includes a Citigroup roadshow and plant visit in Hyderabad.
news.summary:
Cohance Lifesciences announces investor meet on Nov 27, 2025.
Event includes a Citigroup roadshow and plant visit in Hyderabad.

news.title:
Q2 results impact stocks: Astra Micro down 3%, Paras Defence up 3%, Cohance Life falls 8%.
Honasa Consumer surges 9%, Asian Paints extends gains, Tata Steel drops on lower Netherlands margins outlook.
news.summary:
Q2 results impact stocks: Astra Micro down 3%, Paras Defence up 3%, Cohance Life falls 8%.
Honasa Consumer surges 9%, Asian Paints extends gains, Tata Steel drops on lower Netherlands margins outlook.

news.title:
Cohance Lifesciences targets growth via CRAMS, APIs, formulations, expanding Vizag & Hyderabad facilities.
Focus on R&D, backward integration, & high-value molecules; confident in global pharma demand.
news.summary:
Cohance Lifesciences targets growth via CRAMS, APIs, formulations, expanding Vizag & Hyderabad facilities.
